name: Doughnuts- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the first six ingredients to the bread pan. Pour in water. Close the cover and place the yeast sachet in the yeast holder. Select BASIC DOUGH mode and press start. The breadmaker will complete the basic dough stage in approximately 2 hours and 25 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball. Place on a lightly floured surface. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
3. Shape each ball as desired, either into a ring, twisted, or oval shape. Place on a greased baking tray.
4. Prove at 90°C (194°F) for 30 minutes or until nearly doubled in size.
5. Deep fry the doughnuts in oil heated to 180°C (350°F) until golden brown. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Garnish with your choice of toppings.
7. If desired, cut a hole in one end of the doughnut and fill with jelly or your favorite filling.
